products.name: Body Cleanse Shower Gel Lemongrass Malaya 230ml
products.excerpt: Lemongrass Malaya in 230ml as a cleansing gel format for everyday use.
products.description: This product brings the Lemongrass Malaya scent profile into a cleansing gel format for everyday use. It is listed in the latest product draft under Personal Care, with a 230ml fill size. The current stock note indicates a smaller or made-to-order run.
ritual: Use as the opening step in the shower to bring the scent collection onto skin.
Rinse fully and layer with a body or home format from the same scent family.
Keep it near the sink or bath for the most direct daily-use ritual.

products.name: Body Cleanse Shower Oil Lemongrass Malaya 230ml
products.excerpt: Lemongrass Malaya in 230ml as a richer shower oil format for a softer cleanse.
products.description: This product brings the Lemongrass Malaya scent profile into a richer shower oil format for a softer cleanse. It is listed in the latest product draft under Personal Care, with a 230ml fill size. The current stock note indicates a smaller or made-to-order run.
ritual: Massage onto damp skin when you want a softer, more conditioning cleanse.
Rinse lightly so the scent remains closer to the body after the shower.
Pair it with the matching body oil or diffuser to extend the ritual.

products.name: Calm Mousseline Lemongrass Malaya 60ml
products.excerpt: Lemongrass Malaya in 60ml as a soft mist format for linens, fabric, and air.
products.description: This product brings the Lemongrass Malaya scent profile into a soft mist format for linens, fabric, and air. It is listed in the latest product draft under Aromatherapy, with a 60ml fill size. The current stock note indicates a smaller or made-to-order run.
ritual: Mist onto linens, curtains, or fabric surfaces from a short distance.
Let the scent settle for a moment before the textile is in direct contact with skin.
Use between deeper room-scent rituals when you want a lighter refresh.

products.name: Body Oil Lemongrass Malaya 50ml
products.excerpt: Lemongrass Malaya in 50ml as a nourishing body oil for post-shower care.
products.description: This product brings the Lemongrass Malaya scent profile into a nourishing body oil for post-shower care. It is listed in the latest product draft under Personal Care, with a 50ml fill size. The current stock note indicates ready inventory.
ritual: Apply to towel-dried skin after bathing while the body is still slightly warm.
Work it over arms, shoulders, and collarbone so the scent develops gently.
Use a smaller amount when layering with another product from the same collection.

categories.name: All Products
categories.description: The full Aerthera retail catalog, expanded from the latest product sheet and rebuilt with local packshots.
categories.intro: Browse the current storefront assortment across personal care, aromatherapy, lifestyle, and scent-led wellness products.

categories.name: Lemongrass Malaya Collection
categories.description: Aerthera's core Lemongrass Malaya assortment across body care, home fragrance, and aromatherapy formats.
categories.intro: This edit gathers every Lemongrass Malaya SKU currently listed in the retail product draft.

categories.name: Pineapple Tropical Collection
categories.description: A brighter fruit-led assortment translated across cleansing, home, and aromatherapy formats.
categories.intro: The Pineapple Tropical range brings the same product architecture into a warmer, more playful scent direction.

categories.name: Personal Care
categories.description: Daily-use body and scalp products designed to keep the scent ritual close to the skin.
categories.intro: These formats translate Aerthera's scent language into shower, body, and hair routines.

categories.name: Aromatherapy
categories.description: Focused oils, blends, roll-ons, and fabric mists built around everyday aromatherapy use.
categories.intro: This group covers the most concentrated and portable expressions in the catalog.

categories.name: Lifestyle
categories.description: Home fragrance objects and atmosphere-setting formats for slower, spatial rituals.
categories.intro: Diffusers, candles, and sprays sit here as the more architectural side of the collection.

categories.name: Other Scent Formats
categories.description: Small-batch or standalone scent formats that sit outside the main department structure.
categories.intro: These products are part of the retail assortment but do not sit cleanly inside the core departments.
